gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/580)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/580)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا تَدَعْ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِ وَ إِنْ كَانَ بَعْدَهُ شِعْرٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Amro Bin Abdul Aziz, from Jameel Bin Darraj who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not leave (the saying of) ‘In the Name of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Beneficent, the Merciful’, and even though after it is a poem’.
en.sarwar: 1. Allah Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Umar ibn ‘Abd al-‘Aziz from Jamil ibn Darraj who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Do not ignore the expression, “(I begin) in the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful,” even if it is followed by a poem.’”
